properties.name: The Lake Kilrea WaterPark
properties.description: Ireland's giant inflatable water park! Features massive slides, obstacles, and a 'total wipeout' style experience on the lake.

properties.name: Jungle NI
properties.description: One of the best adventure centres in NI. Offering paintball, zorbing, tree-top high ropes, and seasonal events like the Fright Night.

properties.name: Airtastic Craigavon
properties.description: A huge indoor entertainment hub. Features a trampoline park, ninja course, laser tag, and bowling all under one roof.

properties.name: Life Adventure Centre
properties.description: Based in Castlewellan, offering mountain bike hire, kayaking, and canoeing on the lake. Great for active families.

properties.name: Let's Go Hydro
properties.description: A premier water sports park with a huge inflatable aqua park, cable wakeboarding, and luxury glamping pods.

properties.name: Castlewood Tree Top Adventure
properties.description: Climb, swing, and zip through the trees at Antrim Lough Shore. A brilliant challenge for brave little adventurers.

properties.name: Andersonstown Leisure Centre
properties.description: Home to the 'Surf Belfast' indoor wave rider and a fantastic water park with three high-speed water slides.

properties.name: High Rise Lisburn
properties.description: A vertical adventure center featuring Clip 'n Climb walls, a massive soft play, and sensory rooms.

properties.name: Inflatable World
properties.description: Indoor bouncy heaven! A huge warehouse filled with every type of inflatable slide and obstacle you can imagine.

properties.name: DJ's Golf Driving Range
properties.description: A family-friendly driving range in Cookstown. Great for a bit of competitive fun or introducing the kids to golf.

properties.name: Todds Leap Activity Centre
properties.description: Extreme adventure! Off-road trucking, the giant swing, zip lines, and clay pigeon shooting for older kids and adults.
